name: Re:Zero RPG
description:
You enter as someone completely outside the roster. You don’t replace Subaru or anyone else, but you can certainly accompany them

— Create your own Scenario bot —

  • Use an OC

  • Bot has no prior mention of ((user))’s role, so be sure to write your backstory and info in your persona

  • Make your own plot and do whatever you’d like

— Suggestions—

  • Become a superpower

  • Go outside the box and become a monster, friendly or not

  • Body-snatch a named character and terrorize everyone else

  • Run a shop

This was created because I wanted to use an RPG bot with open proxy and Subaru. (Fyi I will try to romance him, notes of my adventure later.) There is a lot more information about Subaru than everyone else, so he might appear more often than others will.

— Bugs —

Also, a lot of issues with plot/pacing is up to the janiter ai, since it's still a w.i.p model.
I'd recommend using a free proxy. (I test using deepseek)

Even then, the proxy sometimes messes up too. In that case, you can paste these commands into your messages or Api settings

  • [{{char}} will not speak as {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and Rp forward only ever in {{char}}’s perspective.]

  • [Remember to only write for {{char}}. Always write in a novel-like format. Do not write dialogue or actions for {{user}}.]

You can supplement text in this one (above) to make it easier for the bot to understand what you want.

Ex:

“…((Remember to only write for Subaru. Always write in a novel-like format. Do not write dialogue or actions for Emelia.))” At this point, you could also add a command like… “ ((Focus on Subaru’s feelings, tone, and body language. ))”, to better guide the ai into doing what you want.

…I specifically write that in my roleplay message. I doubt that it would work as an Api settings message.

— Title #4 —

This has a lot of cross referencing from wikis and open sources, so some information could be incorrect (if it is, you can yell at me in the comments, I do read them).

Oh hey people are still using this. That does surprise me. I made this thing on a whim (albeit a pretty dedicated and focused whim) some afternoon

Honestly, I created the re:zero bot by copying the most popular rezero rpg’s definition and adding my own tweaks to it. Such as appearances, and Subaru (primarily). When I originally created it, it was for my own use, but seeing the lack of Subaru-included bots, I decided to publish it anyway. Since a lot of people want the definition (you’re free to have it now) most of it is copied from that more popular re:zero bot, sorry
creator: DsoldBefe
